mapper.select:
select p.id, p.category_id as categoryId, c.name as categoryName, p.name, p.sub_title as subTitle, p.price, p.stock, p.cover_image as coverImage, p.description, p.status, case when p.status = 1 then '上架' when p.status = 0 then '下架' else '未知' end as statusDesc, p.create_time as createTime, p.update_time as updateTime from loginauthentication_schema.product p left join loginauthentication_schema.product_category c on p.category_id = c.id
p.deleted = 0 and c.deleted = 0
and p.name like concat('%', #{name}, '%')
and p.status = #{status}
order by p.id desc
